fields.summary: CS Flexible Auto Queue Creation: Modify RM /scheduler endpoint to include weight values for queues
[Umbrella] Support Flexible Auto Queue Creation in Capacity Scheduler

status.description: A resolution has been taken, and it is awaiting verification by reporter. From here issues are either reopened, or are closed.
status.name: Resolved

issuetype.description: A new feature of the product, which has yet to be developed.
issuetype.name: New Feature

fields.description:
Under this umbrella (YARN-10496), weight-mode has been implemented for CS with YARN-10504.
 We would like to expose the weight values for all queues with the RM's /scheduler REST endpoint.

resolution.description: A fix for this issue is checked into the tree and tested.
resolution.name: Fixed

Thanks [~wangda],

Fixed the whitespace issues.

As discussed with [~wangda] I'm committing this as he gave a +1, we just wanted to have the Jenkins result.

Thanks [~gandras], [~pbacsko] and [~sunilg] for the reviews.

Resolving this jira.
